name: local-canvas-backend
description: Local Canvas backend service with Express, SQLite, WebSocket, and AI integration

scripts.setup: npm install && cd renderer && npm install
scripts.start: cd renderer && npm run build && cd .. && node src/index.js
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "node --watch src/index.js" "cd renderer && npm run dev"
